label: Fairness, bias & subgroup analysis

node.label: Fairness, bias & subgroup analysis
node.definition: Fairness and subgroup analysis measure performance, treatment, representation, and error disparities across protected or operationally meaningful groups.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Fairness, bias & subgroup analysis is modeled as depending on Statistics & experimental design, Causal inference and feeding downstream nodes such as Medical imaging & clinical decision support, Tabular predictive analytics & decision support.

atlas downstream link to Tabular predictive analytics & decision support
